```python
class Solution:
    def isFascinating(self, n: int) -> bool:
        concatenated = str(n) + str(2 * n) + str(3 * n)
        return len(concatenated) == 9 and set(concatenated) == set('123456789')
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution checks if the concatenated string has a length of 9 and if its set of characters matches the set of digits from '1' to '9', ensuring all digits appear exactly once with no zeros.
